shortDescription: Bright and airy 3-bedroom detached home in the heart of Guildwood, move-in ready with generous lot.
fullDescription: Welcome to 22 Guildwood Parkway in the vibrant Guildwood neighbourhood. This beautifully presented detached home offers generous living space across multiple levels. The main living area opens onto a spacious combined living and dining area flooded with afternoon sun. The kitchen is a chef’s dream with quartz countertops, a large island, and high-end stainless-steel appliances. The sleeping quarters comprise 3 comfortable bedrooms, the largest enjoying a private ensuite bathroom. Building amenities include a fitness centre, rooftop terrace, party room, and 24-hour concierge. Enjoy a 90+ walk score with parks, cafes, schools, and transit all within minutes.
keyFeatures: Updated kitchen with quartz counters and soft-close cabinetry
